heading: Flex Alerts
body:
The following alert conditions apply to
Flex clusters:

- [Connections](<Connections is>)

- [Connections % of configured limit](<Connections % of configured limit is>)

- [DB Data Size is](<DB Data Size is>)

- [Network: Bytes In is](<Network: Bytes In is>)

- [Network: Bytes Out is](<Network: Bytes Out is>)

- [Network: Num Requests is](<Network: Num Requests is>)

- [Opcounter: Cmd is](<Opcounter: Cmd is>)

- [Opcounter: Delete is](<Opcounter: Delete is>)

- [Opcounter: Getmores is](<Opcounter: Getmores is>)

- [Opcounter: Insert is](<Opcounter: Insert is>)

- [Opcounter: Query is](<Opcounter: Query is>)

- [Opcounter: Total is](<Opcounter: Total is>)

- [Opcounter: Update is](<Opcounter: Update is>)
